feat.name: Spiritual Flurry
feat.text: When you use Spiritual Strike, hit targets become off-guard until the end of your current turn. In addition, the additional force damage dealt by the Strike increases by 2d6.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
